{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Spell Primer
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Spell Primer]] is a single syllable used to start most spoken incantations.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
